basics.name: Federico Antonio Yarza Castillo
basics.label: Senior Full Stack Developer | React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, TypeScript
basics.summary: Senior Full Stack Developer with 8+ years of experience building scalable web and mobile applications with React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS, TypeScript, PHP, Laravel, SQL, Docker and CI/CD. Experienced in enterprise systems, microservices, REST APIs, cloud-ready architectures, Agile/Scrum delivery, technical mentoring and cross-functional collaboration.

social.title: Federico Yarza · Senior Full Stack Developer
social.description: 8+ years building web and mobile apps with React, Next.js, Node.js, NestJS and TypeScript. Enterprise projects portfolio.
social.imageAlt: Federico Yarza — Senior Full Stack Developer

work.name: Epidata
work.summary: Full Stack Developer for enterprise platforms, multi-country digital products and legacy modernization initiatives using Next.js, NestJS, TypeScript, PHP, SQL, Docker, CI/CD and Agile/Scrum practices.
highlights: Led ANII modernization by migrating a legacy PHP 5.3 ecosystem to PHP 8.2, improving maintainability, security posture and long-term platform scalability
Designed a Turborepo monorepo with pnpm workspaces for Gabrica Hub, standardizing shared packages, build pipelines and team collaboration across multiple applications
Implemented a Next.js Multi-Zone architecture to unify B2C, B2B and regional applications under a single domain and improve multi-application delivery
Built NestJS 10.x backend services using Domain-Driven Design, Hexagonal Architecture, REST APIs and SQL integrations for enterprise workflows
Established automated testing standards with a minimum 80% coverage target for shared packages, improving regression control and release confidence
Delivered multi-country internationalization with next-intl for 5 countries: Argentina, Colombia, Chile, Uruguay and Paraguay
Mentored developers through code reviews, architecture guidance and Agile delivery practices

work.name: Devinol S.A
work.summary: Full Stack Mobile Developer focused on React Native applications, offline-first features, geolocation, API integrations, performance and user experience.
highlights: Designed and developed an offline-first fitness application, improving reliability for users with limited connectivity
Optimized geolocation features for a dating application, improving location accuracy, map interactions and mobile performance
Led the full refactoring of a restaurant beverage search application, improving maintainability and feature delivery speed

work.name: Freelance
work.summary: Independent consultant delivering web and mobile solutions for ERP, e-commerce, analytics dashboards, automation and education platforms.
highlights: Delivered web and mobile applications integrated with ERP and accounting systems for business process automation
Implemented e-commerce solutions with multiple payment integrations, improving checkout flexibility for client businesses
Built analytical dashboards and data management interfaces for operational reporting and decision-making
Designed a social media automation platform to centralize campaign management and workflow execution
Created an education management platform with attendance tracking, grades control and administrative workflows

work.name: Rv. Medios C.A.
work.position: Full Stack Developer with Specialization in Enterprise Solutions
work.summary: Full Stack Developer for enterprise web systems, accounting platforms, payment modules and digital transformation projects using React, Vue.js, Laravel, PHP and SQL.
highlights: Built the LECOMP B2B portal on Profit Plus 200 ERP (SQL Server) for Lecomp International Group, covering quotes, dual-currency payments, IVA retentions, and operational reporting
Implemented a microservices architecture for a wholesale system, improving modularity and backend maintainability
Built a custom Prestashop payment module to support tailored checkout and transaction flows
Delivered digital transformation projects for Rv. Medios, Vepaco, Cobertura y Tasas and Lecomp
Built full stack web applications with React.js, Vue.js, Laravel, PHP, SQL and REST APIs

education.institution: Facultad Experimental de Ciencias y Tecnología - Universidad de Carabobo

projects.name: Gabrica Hub
projects.description: Multi-country digital hub built with Next.js and NestJS to consolidate multiple business channels (B2C, B2B, MV, Ethics)

Multi-Zone architecture with Next.js
DDD + Hexagonal Architecture
Multi-country: Argentina, Colombia, Chile, Uruguay, Paraguay
Testing with 80%+ coverage

projects.name: Vanguard (Epidata)
projects.description: Multi-service repository based on microservices with a Java (Spring Boot) backend and a Next.js web frontend, including local Docker infrastructure and Kubernetes deployments.
highlights: Java 17 + Spring Boot 3.x microservices (Maven) with an API Gateway (Spring Cloud Gateway) and JWT filters
Next.js 15 frontend with a modern UI stack (Tailwind/Radix) and Bun-based build pipeline
Local development infrastructure via docker-compose (SQL Server, Redis, Seq) and per-service environment configuration
Per-service CI/CD with GitHub Actions: build, push to GHCR, and deploy to Kubernetes (self-hosted runners)
Automated code quality with SonarQube via dedicated workflows per service

projects.name: CVUy
projects.description: Maintenance and permanent updating of validated information about Uruguay's human capital capabilities
highlights: Human capital information management

projects.name: LECOMP B2B Portal
projects.description: Private B2B web portal built on top of the legacy Profit Plus 200 / Admin Plus 200 ERP (SQL Server) for Lecomp International Group C.A., a Venezuelan automotive parts importer and distributor. Exposes the order-to-cash cycle — quoting, picking, invoicing, payments, IVA retentions, and reporting — to clients, sales reps, accountants, and administrators through a modern server-rendered web UI.
highlights: Laravel 5.7 monolith (~58 controllers, 223 Blade views); thin HTTP layer that delegates all business logic to the ERP via stored procedures
SQL Server integration: ~30 stored procedures (sysweb_pProcesarCotizacion, reports, Bs/USD pricing) and 3 sqlsrv connections (sysweb_ + native Profit Plus tables)
Dual-currency Bs/USD with daily exchange rate, discount engine, photo-evidence payment workflow, and IVA retentions aligned with SENIAT/Venezuela workflows
RBAC with Caffeinated Shinobi (70+ permission slugs), single-device sessions, and 20-minute idle timeout
Reporting via server-side DataTables, JasperReports, DomPDF, and Maatwebsite Excel (XLSX import/export with logos and dynamic column widths)
12+ sub-portals: orders/quotes, picking/sales rep, payment confirmation, retentions, catalog, pricing, daily rate, and CMS

projects.name: Fletamos
projects.description: React Native logistics mobile app for Latin America connecting cargo owners (shippers) with transporters for shipment management and real-time tracking.
highlights: React Native 0.70 + React Navigation 6; Redux Toolkit with persistence (redux-persist/thunk) and feature-based organization
Shipper and transporter roles: onboarding, vehicles/trailers, drivers, and a multi-step shipment creation flow (route, cargo, payments)
Map tracking with react-native-maps and geolocation; search, history, and shipment status
Real-time updates via Pusher/Laravel Echo; in-app chat; push notifications with Firebase and Notifee
Payments (Venezuela mobile payment, BS/USD transfers); Firebase Auth and Google Sign-In
UI with Native Base and twrnc utilities; Formik/Yup and react-hook-form; REST client with Axios

projects.name: Autokratic
projects.description: React Native (Expo) mobile app for an automotive marketplace connecting buyers and sellers: search, VIN scanning, AI recommendations, messaging, purchase flow, and a dedicated dealer dashboard.
highlights: React Native 0.71 + Expo ~48 + TypeScript; navigation with React Navigation
State with MobX, MobX-State-Tree and layered architecture (repository pattern, API layer with apisauce)
Buyers: marketplace with filters, VIN scan, favorites, payments and reports; dealers: inventory, publishing and lead management
Multi-language i18n (English, Spanish, Arabic, Korean) with RTL; light/dark theme and push notifications
Google and Apple sign-in, OTP verification; Jest tests and Detox E2E

projects.name: RZGroupSAS
projects.description: React Native (Expo) fleet management and transportation app for RZ Group: truckers, company clients, and administrators with services, vehicles, accounting, payments, and documentation.
highlights: React Native 0.71 + Expo 48 + TypeScript; role-based navigation with React Navigation (separate tab stacks per role)
State with MobX and MobX-State-Tree; layered architecture (API via apisauce with JWT)
Truckers: vehicles, services, expenses, and documents; companies: service monitoring, expenses, and payments; admin: user management and oversight
Accounting and charts (ECharts), high-performance lists (Flash List), documents and PDF; Expo modules (camera, print, sharing)
OTP authentication, role-based registration, Jest tests; optional E2E (e.g. Maestro)

projects.name: WhereMobile
projects.description: React Native (Expo) location-sharing app for contacts: “Where?” pings, interactive map, per-contact timeline, and push notifications.
highlights: React Native 0.69 + Expo ~46 + TypeScript; React Navigation (stack and tabs)
MobX and MobX-State-Tree (auth, user, contacts, location); UI with twrnc and Formik + Yup
Contact management with swipe actions; location pings and map via react-native-maps
Location history timeline per contact; push via expo-notifications; Expo location and contacts permissions
Distributed backend (main API + contacts and location microservices); Jest, Detox, and Storybook

projects.name: CoallyApp
projects.description: React Native (Expo) mobile app connecting students with educational and training opportunities, with AI-assisted support.
highlights: React Native 0.76 + Expo 52 + TypeScript; Ignite 10 boilerplate with a layered structure
State with MobX and MobX-State-Tree; persistence with MMKV and AsyncStorage
Dashboard, profile, training catalog, and opportunities modules; authentication and school selection
i18next across multiple languages (es, en, fr, hi, ar, ja, ko); light/dark theme and environment-based config
UI with twrnc, Reanimated, and bottom sheets; REST APIs via apisauce and Reactotron debugging
